productionEpochPolicy.closeRule: An epoch closes only after all creation targets and its bounded refinement-and-pruning slice pass validation and publication.

legacyPlayableUpgrades.note: Legacy playable upgrades remain excluded from new-production creation counts.

lastCatalogUnit.result: Accepted 10 genuinely new natural-language kit contracts after six additional duplicate, catalog-overlap, or blurred-scope rejections; no implementation was created.

lastCreationUnit.result: Upgraded Next Ledge so Slipstream Launch and Cacheline High converge at Windglass Relay, banking 134 preserved speed or 175 cargo mastery before generic ascent resumes; production creation counts remain unchanged.

lastRefinementUnit.scope: Next Ledge Windglass branch-neutral generic rejoin
lastRefinementUnit.result: Windglass now preserves either branch score into one explicit cyan high-build recovery catch at the original anchor-11 before generic ascent resumes.

lastCompletedUnit.scope: Next Ledge Windglass branch-neutral generic rejoin feel refinement
lastCompletedUnit.result: Windglass now keeps the 134-speed or 175-cargo score live while one readable cyan high-build catch and protected miss-recovery window return the player to original anchor-11.
lastCompletedUnit.validation: All 28 existing Next Ledge test entrypoints, changed JavaScript syntax, JSON, and diff checks passed. Playwright completed the sector-two mint route, scored 134 speed, deliberately missed and recovered with a second grapple, caught original anchor-11, exercised keyboard retry, checked closed/open/closed Advanced disclosure, stable DOM/entity/descriptor counts, and a zero-message console. Human View passed the first screen, open rejoin, and resolved rejoin with diagnostics closed. Matched fresh-browser performance improved from 12.00 to 18.59 FPS, p95 improved from 100.60 to 66.70 ms, and no steady-state entity, descriptor, DOM, or canvas growth appeared.
lastCompletedUnit.publication: Experiments production commit 7895295021aabd058ba15c73fcd5b55a350003f6 and its receipt commit are published on origin/main after fetch-before-push verification; ProtoKits is unchanged and synchronized at 04d34f049f58ae359cf71d43466c429dac2a6d08.

exactNextUnit.goal: Retune the initial Signal Cut commitment from Counterwind Rest so the amber shortcut opens with one readable high-build launch without making it as safe as Shelter Rise.
